import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/pages/Map.tsx");import __vite__cjsImport0_react_jsxDevRuntime from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react_jsx-dev-runtime.js?v=58766444"; const Fragment = __vite__cjsImport0_react_jsxDevRuntime["Fragment"]; const jsxDEV = __vite__cjsImport0_react_jsxDevRuntime["jsxDEV"];
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import __vite__cjsImport1_react from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react.js?v=58766444"; const useEffect = __vite__cjsImport1_react["useEffect"]; const useMemo = __vite__cjsImport1_react["useMemo"]; const useRef = __vite__cjsImport1_react["useRef"]; const useState = __vite__cjsImport1_react["useState"];
import { Link } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react-router-dom.js?v=58766444";
import { Layout } from "/src/ui/Layout.tsx";
const EXHIBITION_SLUG = "polotsk-collegium";
const MAP_IMAGE_SRC = "/route-map-photo.png";
const EDITOR_ACCENTS = ["#8b5e34", "#356f91", "#8f4b93", "#4f8b47", "#c46b2d"];
const MAP_MARKERS = [
  { slug: "facade", x: 51, y: 73, accent: "#8b5e34" },
  { slug: "courtyard", x: 44, y: 57, accent: "#356f91" }
];
const INITIAL_MARKERS_BY_SLUG = new Map(MAP_MARKERS.map((marker) => [marker.slug, marker]));
const FALLBACK_POINTS = [
  {
    slug: "facade",
    title: "?¤?°N??°??",
    description: "????N????° N? ?????µN????µ???? N??°N??°???° ?·???°????N?.",
    image_url: "",
    audio_url: ""
  },
  {
    slug: "courtyard",
    title: "????N?N?N??µ???????? ??????N?",
    description: "????N????° ???? ????N?N?N??µ?????µ?? ??????N??µ ?????»?»?µ????N????°.",
    image_url: "",
    audio_url: ""
  }
];
function normalizePoints(input) {
  if (!Array.isArray(input)) return [];
  return input.filter((item) => {
    return typeof item === "object" && item !== null && typeof item.slug === "string" && typeof item.title === "string" && typeof item.description === "string" && typeof item.image_url === "string" && typeof item.audio_url === "string";
  });
}
export function MapPage() {
  _s();
  const [points, setPoints] = useState(FALLBACK_POINTS);
  const [error, setError] = useState(null);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
  const [draftMarkers, setDraftMarkers] = useState({});
  const [selectedSlug, setSelectedSlug] = useState("");
  const [isEditMode, setIsEditMode] = useState(false);
  const [copyState, setCopyState] = useState("idle");
  const stageRef = useRef(null);
  useEffect(() => {
    const controller = new AbortController();
    const timeoutId = window.setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 5e3);
    fetch(`/api/public/exhibitions/${EXHIBITION_SLUG}/points`, {
      signal: controller.signal
    }).then(async (response) => {
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);
      }
      const data = await response.json();
      const nextPoints = normalizePoints(data.points);
      if (nextPoints.length > 0) {
        setPoints(nextPoints);
      }
      setError(null);
    }).catch(() => {
      setError("???µ N????°?»??N?N? ?·?°??N?N??·??N?N? N???N????? N? N??µN????µN??°, ???????°?·?°??N? ?»?????°?»N???N??µ ???°????N??µ.");
    }).finally(() => {
      window.clearTimeout(timeoutId);
      setIsLoading(false);
    });
    return () => {
      window.clearTimeout(timeoutId);
      controller.abort();
    };
  }, []);
  useEffect(() => {
    setDraftMarkers((prev) => {
      const next = { ...prev };
      points.forEach((point, index) => {
        if (point.slug in next) return;
        next[point.slug] = INITIAL_MARKERS_BY_SLUG.get(point.slug) ?? {
          slug: point.slug,
          x: 50,
          y: 50,
          accent: EDITOR_ACCENTS[index % EDITOR_ACCENTS.length]
        };
      });
      return next;
    });
    setSelectedSlug((prev) => prev || points[0]?.slug || "");
  }, [points]);
  const mappedPoints = useMemo(() => {
    return points.map((point, index) => {
      const marker = draftMarkers[point.slug];
      if (!marker) return null;
      return { ...marker, point, order: index + 1 };
    }).filter((item) => item !== null);
  }, [draftMarkers, points]);
  const selectedMarker = selectedSlug ? draftMarkers[selectedSlug] : null;
  const markerConfigText = useMemo(() => {
    const lines = points.map((point) => draftMarkers[point.slug]).filter((marker) => marker !== null).map(
      (marker) => `  { slug: "${marker.slug}", x: ${marker.x.toFixed(2)}, y: ${marker.y.toFixed(2)}, accent: "${marker.accent}" },`
    );
    if (lines.length === 0) {
      return "const MAP_MARKERS: MapMarker[] = [];";
    }
    return ["const MAP_MARKERS: MapMarker[] = [", ...lines, "];"].join("\n");
  }, [draftMarkers, points]);
  const handleStageClick = (event) => {
    if (!isEditMode || !selectedSlug || !stageRef.current) return;
    const rect = stageRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = Number(((event.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width * 100).toFixed(2));
    const y = Number(((event.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height * 100).toFixed(2));
    setDraftMarkers((prev) => {
      const current = prev[selectedSlug];
      return {
        ...prev,
        [selectedSlug]: {
          slug: selectedSlug,
          x: Math.min(100, Math.max(0, x)),
          y: Math.min(100, Math.max(0, y)),
          accent: current?.accent ?? EDITOR_ACCENTS[0]
        }
      };
    });
    setCopyState("idle");
  };
  const handleCopyConfig = async () => {
    try {
      await window.navigator.clipboard.writeText(markerConfigText);
      setCopyState("copied");
    } catch {
      setCopyState("error");
    }
  };
  const handleResetSelected = () => {
    if (!selectedSlug) return;
    const initialMarker = INITIAL_MARKERS_BY_SLUG.get(selectedSlug) ?? null;
    setDraftMarkers((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      [selectedSlug]: initialMarker
    }));
    setCopyState("idle");
  };
  const selectedPoint = points?.find((point) => point.slug === selectedSlug) ?? null;
  const editorHint = selectedPoint ? `??N??±N??°???° N???N????°: ${selectedPoint.title}. ???»????????N??µ ???? ???°N?N??µ, N?N????±N? ????N?N??°????N?N? ???µN???N?.` : "??N??±?µN???N??µ N???N???N? ?? ???»????????N??µ ???? ???°N?N??µ.";
  const copyMessage = copyState === "copied" ? "??????N????? N?????????N??????°??." : copyState === "error" ? "???µ N????°?»??N?N? N?????????N??????°N?N? ?°??N??????°N???N??µN?????." : "?????¶???? ????????N??????°N?N? ??????N????? ????N??»?µ ???°?¶?????? ??N??°??????.";
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(Layout, { title: "???°N?N??° ???°N?N?N?N?N??°", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "map-page", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("p", { className: "map-page__lead", children: "??N??±?µN???N??µ N???N???N? ???° N?N??µ???µ ?????»?»?µ????N????°, N?N????±N? N?N??°?·N? ??N???N?N?N?N? N?N?N??°????N?N? ??N?N??°?????????? ?°N??????????°N?N?N?N?N??°." }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "C:/dev/museum-audioguide/frontend/src/pages/Map.tsx",
      lineNumber: 218,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "map-page__actions", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(Link, { to: `/g/${EXHIBITION_SLUG}/points`, className: "app-button-link", children: "?? N?????N???N? N???N??µ??" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "C:/dev/museum-audioguide/frontend/src/pages/Map.tsx",
      lineNumber: 224,
      columnNumber: 11
    }, this) }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "C:/dev/museum-audioguide/frontend/src/pages/Map.tsx",
      lineNumber: 223,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this),
    error && /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("p", { style: { color: "#8b4513" }, children: error }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "C:/dev/museum-audioguide/frontend/src/pages/Map.tsx",
      lineNumber: 229,
      columnNumber: 19
    }, this),
    isLoading && /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("p", { style: { color: "var(--muted)" }, children: "???°??N?N??·???° N???N??µ??a?¦" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "C:/dev/museum-audioguide/frontend/src/pages/Map.tsx",

      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("section", { className: "map-editor", children: [

          /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("label", { className: "map-editor__toggle", children: [
            /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(

                onChange: (event) => setIsEditMode(event.target.checked)

      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("section", { className: "map-card", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
        "div",

          ref: stageRef,
          className: "map-stage" + (isEditMode ? " map-stage--editable" : ""),
          onClick: handleStageClick,
          children: [
            /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
              "img",
              {
                src: MAP_IMAGE_SRC,
                alt: "?¤??N?????N??°N???N? ???°N?N?N? ???°N?N?N?N?N??° ???? ?·???°????N? ?????»?»?µ????N????°",

              fileName: "C:/dev/museum-audioguide/frontend/src/pages/Map.tsx",
              lineNumber: 313,
              columnNumber: 15
            }, this),
            mappedPoints.map(
              ({ slug, x, y, accent, point, order }) => /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
                Link,
                {
                  to: `/g/${EXHIBITION_SLUG}/p/${slug}`,
                  className: "map-marker" + (isEditMode ? " map-marker--editing" : "") + (selectedSlug === slug ? " map-marker--selected" : ""),
                  onClick: (event) => {
                    if (isEditMode) {
                      event.preventDefault();
                      event.stopPropagation();
                      setSelectedSlug(slug);

                  },

                    left: `${x}%`,

    }, this)

    lineNumber: 217,

  }, this) }, void 0, false, {
    fileName: "C:/dev/museum-audioguide/frontend/src/pages/Map.tsx",

}
_s(MapPage, "JXYuyt7buSaP/H6nvtkkAvRn2e4=");
_c = MapPage;
var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "MapPage");
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("C:/dev/museum-audioguide/frontend/src/pages/Map.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("C:/dev/museum-audioguide/frontend/src/pages/Map.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
function $RefreshReg$(type, id) {
  return RefreshRuntime.register(type, "C:/dev/museum-audioguide/frontend/src/pages/Map.tsx " + id);
}
function $RefreshSig$() {
  return RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform();
}

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
